ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_address" TEXT /* Address of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site (e.g., Peterchurch, Golden Valley North) */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Coordinates of the site (latitude and longitude) */,
  "boundary" TEXT /* Boundary of the site (in a format suitable for spatial analysis) */,
  "zoning" TEXT /* Zoning information of the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the application type (e.g., Full Householder, Outline) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the application type */,
  "required_documents" TEXT /* Documents required for the application type (e.g., plans, elevations) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., Determination Made, Approved with Conditions) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "next_statuses" TEXT /* Next possible statuses for the application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application the document belongs to */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document (e.g., plans, elevations) */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., PDF, JPEG) */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the document file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the document (e.g., plans, reports) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., planning officer, developer, public) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization of the user (if applicable) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the user (phone number, address) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_site" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship between the application and the site (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id", "site_id")
)
